reason: The duplicate section titles are a cosmetic issue with negligible user impact. While s6 and s7 share the title "プロパティファイルの記述ルール", the hint arrays are completely disjoint: s6 hints cover loggerFactory/writerNames/availableLoggersNamesOrder/nameRegex, while s7 hints cover FileLogWriter/SynchronousFileLogWriter/filePath/lockFilePath/etc. An AI agent performing section retrieval will match via hints, not titles alone, so the ambiguity does not impair retrieval accuracy.

findings_assessment.justification: Duplicate titles ('プロパティファイルの記述ルール') create theoretical ambiguity, but the hint arrays for s6 and s7 are entirely distinct and cover non-overlapping property sets. An AI agent will select the correct section through hint matching regardless of title collision. The fix did not persist through Phase E because the structured output in the E-phase log preserves the original index unchanged — the fix loop regenerated content but left the index titles unmodified, likely because the section content itself was not flagged as incorrect, only the title metadata.
